channel.title: Bully Sticks on Pet Gear Note
channel.description: Recent content in Bully Sticks on Pet Gear Note

item.title: Best Bully Sticks for Aggressive Chewers, Puppies, and Odor Control
item.description: Compare bully sticks by thickness, odor, digestibility, supervision needs, puppy fit, calories, and aggressive-chewer value.
